description_long: This hostel is a two-story rectangular building with a white exterior and large arched windows along its main facades. The structure features a prominent central entrance with a semi-circular staircase and a decorative balcony above, as well as a side spiral staircase leading to an upper level. The grounds include a landscaped garden area with flowering trees and a classical-style open pavilion or gazebo adjacent to a pool or water feature. The roof is flat, and the building's interior is partially visible, showing communal spaces and rooms. The overall design blends neoclassical elements with modern touches, creating an inviting and elegant appearance suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A white, two-story hostel with arched windows, a central entrance with a semi-circular staircase, landscaped gardens, and a classical pavilion by a pool.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long facade with multiple arched windows, the landscaped garden, and the classical pavilion with a pool on the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side spiral staircase and the full extent of the garden and pavilion are visible, along with the building's side wall.
description_view_2: The rear facade is shown here, featuring the main entrance with a semi-circular staircase, a balcony above, and more arched windows.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side of the building, revealing the spiral staircase and the back rooms, with less emphasis on the garden and pavilion.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the longer facade, featuring a semi-circular staircase leading up to a set of double doors. Above the entrance is a small balcony with a decorative railing. The entrance is framed by classical architectural elements and is visually prominent.
attribute_window_arrangement: The building has large, evenly spaced arched windows along its main facades, providing symmetry and a classical appearance. Windows are grouped in sets, with some smaller rectangular windows on the sides and upper levels. The frames are simple, and there are no visible shutters.
attribute_balcony_presence: There is a single balcony above the main entrance, featuring a decorative railing. No other balconies are visible on the building.
attribute_architectural_style: Neoclassical with modern influences, characterized by arched windows, a symmetrical facade, classical columns, and a landscaped garden with a pavilion.
